subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-09-23 in Denver
subcodes.first_line: In the early stages of our long journey to California my health was affected... It is written in the Hadith that cities shall draw nearer to each other.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از طول راه کلیفورنیا در ابتدای حرکت متأثر می شدم ولی چون لله و محض نشر نفحات الله حرکت کردیم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
